summary: Plan-only remediation assessment over five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment/label are blocked and no PR has complete merge preflight proof with a clean Codex /review plus resolved review-bot findings.

actions.reason: Good repair candidate, but merge is blocked by missing merge preflight proof required by policy.
Concrete maintainer-safe repair path exists on the contributor branch, but merge is blocked by unresolved latest review status and missing complete merge preflight.
Repair the current superseding branch rather than merge now; latest review status and merge preflight are incomplete.
Cannot recommend merge while Real behavior proof is failing and review findings are not proven resolved; contributor branch is repairable.
This is not an implementation repair problem; it requires maintainer product judgment on whether third-party hardware appliance documentation belongs in-tree.
Treat #79687 as the superseded source PR for credit and repair context; do not close in this plan.
Security-sensitive linked context must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without blocking unrelated non-security PR classification.

needs_human: #87627 requires maintainer product judgment on whether third-party ClawBox hardware appliance documentation belongs in the OpenClaw docs tree.
